# Project Instructions

## Project Details

DropBox Clone - A minimalistic file management application built with React and Vite.

### Features Implemented

- ✅ User authentication (email/password)
- ✅ Dark and light mode support
- ✅ File upload and download
- ✅ Folder creation and navigation
- ✅ Recent files view
- ✅ Minimalistic UI with CSS Modules
- ✅ Zero external UI dependencies

### Tech Stack

- React 19
- Vite 7
- CSS Modules for styling
- LocalStorage for data persistence

### Development

Run `npm install` then `npm run dev` to start the development server.
Login with any email/password combination to access the dashboard.
